scripts.build:sidecar: mkdir -p src-tauri/binaries && cd ../opencode && bun build --compile ../deepseek-code-public/src-sidecar/index.ts --outfile ../deepseek-code-public/src-tauri/binaries/opencode-sidecar-$(rustc -Vv | grep host | cut -d ' ' -f 2)
scripts.build: bun run build:sidecar && tsc && vite build
scripts.test: export PATH="$PATH:$HOME/.bun/bin" && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && bun test
scripts.build:mac: bun run build:sidecar && tauri build && (killall deepseek-code || true) && cp -rf src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/deepseek-code.app /Applications/
